productTitle: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall
name: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall
title: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall
short_description: The UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall is a high-performance wall-mounted Wi-Fi 7 access point designed for environments with dense device usage, such as offices, hotels, classrooms, and multi-tenant buildings.
description: The UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall is a high-performance wall-mounted Wi-Fi 7 access point designed for environments with dense device usage, such as offices, hotels, classrooms, and multi-tenant buildings. Supporting tri-band operation across 2.4 GHz, 5 GHz, and the new 6 GHz spectrum, it delivers up to six spatial streams to ensure high throughput and reliable connections for hundreds of devices simultaneously. Maximum data rates reach 5.8 Gbps on the 6 GHz band, 4.3 Gbps on 5 GHz, and 688 Mbps on 2.4 GHz. MU-MIMO technology and advanced radio management optimize network performance, reduce latency, and balance load efficiently among multiple clients. Features like fast roaming (802.11r), band steering, and BSS transition management enhance user experience, making video conferencing, cloud applications, and streaming seamless even in high-density environments. The AP covers up to 140 m² and supports 300+ clients, ensuring stable, high-speed wireless connectivity across large spaces without performance degradation.

detailed_description.heading: WiFi 7 Performance
detailed_description.text: The UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall is a high-performance wall-mounted Wi-Fi 7 access point designed for environments with dense device usage, such as offices, hotels, classrooms, and multi-tenant buildings. Supporting tri-band operation across 2.4 GHz, 5 GHz, and the new 6 GHz spectrum, it delivers up to six spatial streams to ensure high throughput and reliable connections for hundreds of devices simultaneously. Maximum data rates reach 5.8 Gbps on the 6 GHz band, 4.3 Gbps on 5 GHz, and 688 Mbps on 2.4 GHz. MU-MIMO technology and advanced radio management optimize network performance, reduce latency, and balance load efficiently among multiple clients. Features like fast roaming (802.11r), band steering, and BSS transition management enhance user experience, making video conferencing, cloud applications, and streaming seamless even in high-density environments. The AP covers up to 140 m² and supports 300+ clients, ensuring stable, high-speed wireless connectivity across large spaces without performance degradation.

detailed_description.heading: 10 GbE Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall is equipped with a single 10 GbE RJ45 port, providing full-speed wired connectivity to fully complement its high-speed Wi‑Fi 7 performance. Power is delivered via PoE+, simplifying installation and eliminating the need for a separate power source. The wall-mounted form factor is ideal for offices, hotels, apartments, and educational institutions, providing discreet placement with professional aesthetics. The AP’s enclosure is made from durable polycarbonate, with the mounting components constructed from aluminum alloy for robust support and effective heat dissipation. With a maximum power consumption of just 22 W, it remains energy-efficient while delivering exceptional performance. Its compact and elegant design allows the AP to blend seamlessly into the environment while providing reliable high-speed wired and wireless connectivity for a large number of users in demanding settings.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Network Control
detailed_description.text: The UniFi U7 Pro XG Wall is fully managed through the UniFi Network platform, enabling centralized control, monitoring, and network optimization. It offers advanced enterprise features, including guest portals, voucher-based authentication, private pre-shared key (PPSK) support, RADIUS authentication with dynamic VLAN assignment, and secure RadSec communication. Additional functionality includes wireless meshing, client isolation, bandwidth control, Wi-Fi scheduling, and advanced radio resource management, allowing administrators to tailor network behavior for different users and scenarios. The AP is compatible with UniFi Network version 10.0 and higher, providing access to the latest software updates and feature enhancements. Compliance with NDAA regulations and certifications including CE, FCC, and IC ensure suitability for professional and regulated environments. With an operating temperature range of -30 to +40 °C and 5–95% non-condensing humidity, the U7 Pro XG Wall offers reliable performance even in challenging environmental conditions, making it a durable and flexible solution for modern high-density Wi-Fi deployments.
